case_title: CAL STATE 9 CREDIT UNION VS DOMINGUEZ, NELSON C.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, NELSON C.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF, CAL STATE 9 CREDIT UNION, RETURNED "ADDRESSED NOT DELIVERABLE/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
